prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MOMECALWB-2O-CLR-1-2PK Product Type: CLEANING_AGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Zipper Cleaner and Lubricant for Wetsuits, Tents and Bags, 2 fl oz, 2-pk Description: The Zip Care Zipper Cleaner and Lubricant is the ideal zipper care for metal, nylon or plastic zippers. It features a pull-push brush top that enables the cleaner to be easily distributed between the zipper teeth and will physically remove harmful dirt and other debris that can jam your zipper.

Designed for use on wet and dry suits, gear bags, clothing and environmental suits, you'll be able to prolong the life of your zippers with Zip Care.

The lubricating system is specifically formulated to lubricate and clean zippers. It will rinse away after submerged in water, leaving a unique protective film that will continue to lubricate without collecting unsightly residue.

Make sure to keep Zip Care around to ensure that your zippers and gear are usable at all times. Search Terms: diving diver gear neoprene lubricant Features: - Release stuck zippers on wetsuits, tents, jackets, sleeping bags and luggage with this multipurpose 2-in-1 formula - Prolong zipper life by protecting against UV, salt, chlorine, rust and corrosion, which can jam the zipper; available in 2 fl oz bottle - Remove dirt and salt deposits from zipper teeth with included brush-top; formula repels dirt and debris from the zipper - Use this non-toxic lubricant on plastic, nylon or metal zippers; contains no silicone or paraffin wax (formerly Zip Care) - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Zipper Cleaner and Lubricant, 2 fl oz, 2-pk

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 2-pk 2 fl oz Zipper Cleaner Lubricant

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-In-1 Cleaner And Lubricant, Brush Top Applicator, Removes Dirt And Salt, UV And Corrosion Protection, All Zipper Types

openai.title_differentiation: Brush-Top Applicator, Removes Dirt And Salt, Protects Against UV Salt Chlorine Rust, Non-Toxic, No Silicone
